title: CosyCraft
description: Modpack about Farming, Grinding, Adventure and More!
body:
CosyCraft: A World for Everyone!

CosyCraft is a modpack for everyone, mixing relaxation and adventure. Whether you prefer farming and building your dream base or grinding through dungeons and battling powerful bosses, there’s something for everyone. Explore diverse landscapes, gather resources, and gear up with unique tools and armor to face challenges. With countless decorative options and farming mechanics, you can unwind, create, and thrive at your own pace. Dive into a world where every player can find their perfect balance of calm and excitement. # Licences This modpack is using Twigs - https://modrinth.com/mod/twigs
